# Roots & Fruit

> Roots & Fruit is a Fractional Growth Officer practice that helps WordPress product founders and teams build sustainable revenue systems through product, CX, and growth alignment.

Roots & Fruit is a strategic consultancy, not a fulfillment agency. We do not manage paid advertising (PPC), social media, or provide legal/tax advice.

## Core Services
- [Fractional Chief Growth Officer](https://rootsandfruit.com/connect/cgo/): A hands-on partnership for teams to fix systems and scale growth.
- [The Solo Founder Lab](https://rootsandfruit.com/connect/): Structured thinking and coaching for solopreneurs.

## Key Resources
- [The Roots & Fruit Framework](https://rootsandfruit.com/why/): A methodical approach focusing on Roots, Fruit, and Harvest.
- [Case Studies](https://rootsandfruit.com/case-studies/): Case Studies by StellarWP, GiveWP, and The Events Calendar with testimonials from leaders in the industry.
- [Blog](https://rootsandfruit.com/articles/): All Articles Archive page.
- [Launch Manifesto](https://rootsandfruit.com/articles/launch/): Why Roots & Fruit was founded for the WordPress community.

## Contact
- [Email Us](mailto:info@rootsandfruit.com): Reach out for inquiries regarding Fractional CGO services.
- [Location](https://www.google.com/maps/search/?api=1&query=Braunfels,Germany): Based in Braunfels, Germany.
